title: MosaicSDUI
description: The single source of truth for the Mosaic Server-Driven-UI contract. Language bindings (Go, TypeScript, Dart) are GENERATED from this file — do not hand-edit them. The root object exists only so a generator reaches every top-level type; the useful types are in $defs.

UINode.title: UINode
UINode.description: One element of a server-driven UI tree. The `type` is an open vocabulary: a client that does not recognise a type renders a placeholder rather than failing.

Action.title: Action
Action.description: A declarative behaviour envelope. Data, never code — the client interprets the kind. Each kind uses a subset of the fields.

ComponentDefinition.title: ComponentDefinition
ComponentDefinition.description: A component expressed as data: a name, default params, and a template of primitives. Clients register definitions and expand them; this is how a module contributes a component without shipping client code. A template node's props may hold binding objects ({"$bind":"path"} / {"$match":{…}}) and control keys ($if / $ifNot / $each / $as); a node of type "Outlet" renders the caller's children or a named slot.

name.description: The node type this definition provides.

params.description: Default param values, overridden by the caller's props.
